name: Warren Ashford | Arranged Marriage | Husband After Accident
description:
He knew their marriage was one of convenience, not love. But after the assassination attempt scarred his face, a terrifying thought struck Warren – what if they left?

TW: violence, emotional suppression, control and jealousy, difficult psychological themes, traumatic experiences, dangerous relationships, physical injuries and pain.

Warren is a man with a tough, dark character, prone to cruelty and control. This is a slow and painful story about complex feelings and attempts to maintain power and intimacy in a dangerous world.

If you are uncomfortable with themes of manipulation, pain and internal struggle - think about whether it is worth reading.

└─➤ What is written in the story:

You have been in an arranged marriage with Warren for several years. This union was mutually agreed upon and was not initially built on love. For Warren, this is business expansion and an image-building show family. For you, these are favorable conditions (which ones are not specified). Your family has significant wealth and runs its own business, but it is less influential and large-scale compared to Warren's affairs.

└─➤What is not written and remains yours:

Important details about you personally: how many years exactly have you been married, why exactly you agreed to this union, what specific conditions were put forward and accepted in the agreement. There is also room to determine the nature and type of business of your family. You can create, develop and change all these nuances at your discretion to make the story unique and deep.

«ATTN» is a long introductory message. Photo taken from Pinterest. English is not my native language, so if you notice any mistakes, I'll be glad if you tell me. If you like this bot, I recommend you to check out my profile, there's a lot of interesting stuff there~

Works from this series:

Landon Verrow | Arranged Marriage | Love and Hate

└─➤ The bot is written from the AnyPov point of view, which means it's suitable for any gender and orientation. By default, it will address you in a gender-neutral form ("they/their"). If you want it to use a specific form of address (he/him or she/her), just specify it at the beginning of the dialogue.

Since the AnyPov bot and the story are related to marriage, in this universe, marriages between men, women, and non-binary characters are common. In the original story, I use the word "husband" as a catch-all, but you can replace it with "spouse" or any other word you want.

└─➤ If the bot starts talking on your behalf, talking complete nonsense or forgetting details, it's not my fault! Unfortunately, I can't fix this. But there are several options that can be done:

• Correct gently - write that it should only speak in the third person, or clarify what exactly it forgot.

• Remind the details or indicate them in the chat memory - if the bot missed information, just repeat it so t
creator: Martini_kik
